クラス Process

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Thread
      • Process
  • すべての実装されたインタフェース:
    java.lang.Runnable
    直系の既知のサブクラス:
    CTConsensus, TestAlgorithm

    public class Process
extends java.lang.Thread
    An implementation of process entity. Algorithm implementation has to be extended this class.

    • ネストされたクラスのサマリー

      • クラスから継承されたネストされたクラス/インタフェース java.lang.Thread

        java.lang.Thread.State, java.lang.Thread.UncaughtExceptionHandler

    • フィールドのサマリー

      • クラスから継承されたフィールド java.lang.Thread

        MAX_PRIORITY, MIN_PRIORITY, NORM_PRIORITY

    • メソッドのサマリー

      すべてのメソッド インスタンス・メソッド concreteメソッド 
      修飾子とタイプ メソッドと説明
      void delayStart()
      The method is to delay a process initiation.
      void delayStart(long msec)
      The method is to delay a process initiation.
      long getDelayTime()
      To get a delay time.
      MessageQueue getMessageQueue()
      Get the MessageQueue
      Message receive()
      receive() method realizes receiving a message from another process.
      void run() 
      void send(int dest, Message m)
      send() method realizes sending a message to another process.
      void setDelayTime(long msec)
      To set a delay time.
      void setMessageQueue(MessageQueue mq)
      Set the MessageQueue

      • クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Thread

        activeCount, checkAccess, clone, countStackFrames, currentThread, destroy, dumpStack, enumerate, getAllStackTraces, getContextClassLoader, getDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler, getId, getName, getPriority, getStackTrace, getState, getThreadGroup, getUncaughtExceptionHandler, holdsLock, interrupt, interrupted, isAlive, isDaemon, isInterrupted, join, join, join, resume, setContextClassLoader, setDaemon, setDefaultUncaughtExceptionHandler, setName, setPriority, setUncaughtExceptionHandler, sleep, sleep, start, stop, stop, suspend, toString, yield

      • クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

        equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • メソッドの詳細

      • send

        public void send(int dest,
                 Message m)
        send() method realizes sending a message to another process. sending a message is actually implemented as enqueuing the message into message queue of the destination process. TODO: make another send method without destination argument (broadcast)
        パラメータ:
        dest - 宛先のプロセスID
        m - メッセージ本体

      • receive

        public Message receive()
        receive() method realizes receiving a message from another process. receiving a message is actually implemented as dequeuing the message from own message queue. receiving messages may fail and return null because of empty of the message queue.
        戻り値:
        a message dequeued from the message queue and cast it into Message class.

      • setMessageQueue

        public void setMessageQueue(MessageQueue mq)
        Set the MessageQueue
        パラメータ:
        mq -

      • getMessageQueue

        public MessageQueue getMessageQueue()
        Get the MessageQueue
        戻り値:
        MessageQueue

      • setDelayTime

        public void setDelayTime(long msec)
        To set a delay time.
        パラメータ:
        msec -

      • getDelayTime

        public long getDelayTime()
        To get a delay time.
        戻り値:
        delay

      • delayStart

        public void delayStart()
        The method is to delay a process initiation.

      • delayStart

        public void delayStart(long msec)
        The method is to delay a process initiation.
        パラメータ:
        msec -

      • run

        public void run()
        定義:
        run インタフェース内 java.lang.Runnable
        オーバーライド:
        run クラス内 java.lang.Thread
